product_definition.title: UI Framework
product_definition.description: A production-ready UMG UI framework for UE5.5. Provides a widget manager subsystem, screen stack navigation, modal dialog system, animated transitions, data binding via MVVM, and a complete HUD composition pipeline.
product_definition.target_audience: Game developers who want a scalable, designer-friendly UI architecture

core_features: UUIManagerSubsystem: push/pop widget stack, show/hide named screens
UScreenBase: base widget class with OnShow, OnHide, animated transitions
Modal dialog system: OK, OKCancel, custom button layouts
UMythViewModel base class for MVVM data binding
Tooltip system: hover-triggered tooltips with configurable delay
Notification/toast system: queue-based, auto-dismiss with icon and message
HUD compositor: slot-based HUD regions (top-left, center, etc.)
Loading screen manager with background image and progress bar
Localization-ready: all text via FText with string table keys

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: HUD displays on game start, modal dialog opens on key press, toast notification shown
